title: bpftool bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[7.5.0-6]
- Update to BPF 6.14 stable backport

[7.5.0-5]
- Make kernel tarball dist independent of %{dist}

[7.5.0-4]
- Update to BPF 6.12 rebase

[7.5.0-3]
- Fix LLVM feature detection

[7.5.0-2]
- Initial gating test for bpftool

[7.5.0-1]
- Initial commit on c9s
full_text:
[7.5.0-6]
- Update to BPF 6.14 stable backport

[7.5.0-5]
- Make kernel tarball dist independent of %{dist}

[7.5.0-4]
- Update to BPF 6.12 rebase

[7.5.0-3]
- Fix LLVM feature detection

[7.5.0-2]

[7.5.0-1]
